title: Dozens killed by Israeli gunfire near aid sites in south Gaza, Hamas-run ministry says
description: More than 100 others were also injured near two sites run by the Gaza Humanitarian Foundation, according to the Hamas-run health ministry and civil defence agency.

title: Syrian presidency announces ceasefire after deadly sectarian clashes in south
description: The move comes after days of clashes between Bedouin and Druze fighters in Suweida that have reportedly left hundreds dead.

title: At least 34 dead after tourist boat capsizes in Vietnam
description: The incident happened in Vietnam's busy Ha Long Bay during bad weather, and at least 14 people are missing, local reports say.

title: Car ploughs into crowd outside LA nightclub, injuring 30
description: The driver was dragged by bystanders out of the Nissan Versa and beaten and shot.

title: Hope for peace as DR Congo and M23 rebels sign deal in Qatar
description: The declaration says both parties must sign a final peace deal by mid-August.

title: 'The village will die' - Italy looks for answers to decline in number of babies
description: The government wants to encourage women to have babies but Italians say they need greater help.

title: Buildings burn as another wave of Russian attacks hits Ukraine
description: At least three people are killed in the barrage, which the Ukrainian president says targeted 10 regions.

title: South Africa building collapse that killed 34 was 'entirely preventable', minister says
description: Workers reported feeling vibrations in the partially built structure, and being told to cover up holes with sand.

title: US tech CEO suspended after Coldplay concert embrace goes viral
description: Big screen footage of the two people went viral after reports they were colleagues and at least one was married to another person.

title: Trump sues Murdoch and Wall Street Journal for $10bn over Epstein article
description: The lawsuit is over a story claiming the president wrote a "bawdy" personal note to Jeffrey Epstein in 2003.

title: Sylvanian Families' legal battle over TikTok sex, drugs and murder videos
description: The toys' owner is suing a TikTok creator who makes videos of them in adult storylines.

title: Imperfect Lions beat Australia to take series lead
description: The Lions get their series off to a winning start by beating Australia 27-19 in the first Test at the Suncorp Stadium in Brisbane.

title: At least 80 arrested in UK protests against ban on Palestine Action group
description: The Met Police says it has made 55 arrests at one of several demonstrations across the country.

title: Why the Epstein case looms large in MAGA world
description: A subset of Trump supporters are passionate about the case - and angry at the president.

title: 'Gangsta Debbs' - the granny who used her family to run an £80m drug empire
description: As the matriarch of a high-earning crime family, Deborah Mason lived a lavish lifestyle – but also claimed £50,000 in benefits.

title: Why Prada – and other luxury brands – keep getting India wrong
description: A controversy involving Prada has put the spotlight on how global fashion giants engage with India.

title: MasterChef crisis: Presenters Wallace and Torode were 'never friends'
description: There were nine complaints against Torode, BBC learns - and show’s producers had hoped to ride out the storm.

title: Exploring Britain's most extraordinary cricket grounds
description: BBC Sport’s Graeme Langford takes a trip around Britain to see the most extraordinary village cricket grounds in the country.

title: Is this the death of the late night US chat show?
description: Viewers were taken by surprise this week when Stephen Colbert announced the end of The Late Show.

title: The policeman shaking South Africa with explosive allegations about his boss
description: Mkhwanazi's explosive claims have resulted in a suspension and the launch of two inquiries.

title: Watch: Why is Donald Trump asking Coca-Cola to change its recipe?
description: The US president says it's better to make the fizzy drink with cane sugar, but why might that be?

title: 'Oh God, there it goes' - Campervan swept under bridge in Indiana floods
description: Flash floods swept away the empty vehicle, causing it to careen into the bridge.

title: Watch: 'She took me back' - Obamas joke about divorce rumours

title: How popping a pimple led to a man getting sepsis

title: El Salvador and US negotiate prisoner swap with Venezuela

title: Thousands of Afghans won't be compensated by UK for data breach
